missingSurface: Machine-readable invalidation-chain authority across choice, package, dispatch, outcome, and return truth.
temporaryFallback: Keep the invalidation chains published by 345 authoritative until downstream kernels land.
riskIfUnresolved: Stale consent, stale packages, ambiguous outcomes, or urgent return debt could be treated as calm or current by later tracks.
followUpAction: Tracks 348 to 354 must prove they consume these invalidation chains before merge.

invalidationChains.trigger: Provider change, provider capability drift, or pathway change
invalidationChains.blockedOutcome: Dispatch readiness must fail closed until choice and package truth are refreshed.
invalidationChains.proofLaw: Provider or pathway change invalidates stale consent and stale package assumptions before dispatch can proceed.

invalidationChains.trigger: Consent supersession, package supersession, or package hash drift
invalidationChains.blockedOutcome: Any in-flight or pending dispatch must be treated as stale and non-authoritative.
invalidationChains.proofLaw: Stale consent or package drift invalidates dispatch readiness and current proof posture.

invalidationChains.trigger: Outcome ambiguity, contradiction, or weak match review
invalidationChains.blockedOutcome: Closure and calm completion stay blocked until reconciliation settles.
invalidationChains.proofLaw: Outcome ambiguity blocks closure and calm completion.

invalidationChains.trigger: Urgent return, no-contact return, or reachability repair failure
invalidationChains.blockedOutcome: Patient and practice posture must remain visibly non-calm while return debt or reachability repair stays open.
invalidationChains.proofLaw: Urgent return or reachability failure invalidates calm patient or practice posture.

invalidationChains.blockedOutcome: Automatic redispatch or close remains blocked until supervisor or review authority settles the case.
invalidationChains.proofLaw: Loop-risk review blocks automatic redispatch or close.
